cases.prompt: 우리 SaaS 대시보드 디자인 시안 Stitch 용 프롬프트 3개 만들어줘

assertions.text: The agent produces Safe, Bold, Wild variants — 3 distinct prompts with different aesthetic directions.
The prompts include the Korean+English bilingual constraint (한/영 병기).
The agent makes zero references to Stitch API, MCP, or API keys — only manual paste-in workflow.
